comments: Approved. The contract scope explicitly bounds the refactor to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, src/mcp-server/src/worktree-manager.ts, and bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js via the scope description and allowed_files list. The out_of_scope section explicitly forbids Hermes (L2) from manually injecting OpenAI API keys, hand-writing source code, or bypassing the OMOC Synergy environment, which enforces use of the OMOC Synergy mechanism. The scope note also states that tasks/ is strictly for execution result artifacts and must not contain implementation code, and the allowed_artifacts list keeps tasks/ limited to review/execution artifact files. Overall, the contract is sufficiently constrained for the requested architecture refactor review.
